description_long: This nightstand features a classic rectangular silhouette with a deep black finish and subtle wood grain texture. The front is adorned with a single drawer at the top, fitted with a round knob, and a larger cabinet door below, also with a matching knob. The top surface is broad and flat, bordered by a slightly protruding beveled edge, ideal for supporting lamps or personal items. The sides and back are plain, with the sides showing the same wood grain pattern and the back being completely flat. The base is slightly raised on four small, rounded feet, giving it a traditional and sturdy appearance. The overall design is simple yet elegant, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functionality.
description: A black wooden nightstand with a single drawer, cabinet door, and beveled top, supported by four small rounded feet. The design is classic and functional with minimal decoration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the drawer with a round knob, a cabinet door with a matching knob, and the beveled top edge.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain wood grain side panel and the protruding top edge.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, undecorated back panel with no visible hardware.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the plain side panel and the beveled top edge.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
